location.office_time_required: hybrid model across home office, in-market site visits, and cross-functional collaboration

level_signals: Manages a team of three Regulatory Operations Senior Associates
Reports to a Senior Manager within DashMart Strategy & Operations
Comp range $136K–$200K base consistent with a Manager-level role at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4–6+ years of professional experience. You've succeeded operating in fast-paced, high-performance environments and exposure to local government or city planning processes.
exposure to local government or city planning processes
You let data win arguments, and you're comfortable pulling your own data in SQL or modeling in Excel.
you will own the end-to-end regulatory strategy and execution that unlocks growth while minimizing risk, cost, and timelines.
You will lead a team of three Regulatory Operations Senior Associates
partner cross-functionally with Real Estate, Legal, Construction, Public Policy, Category Management, and Operations teams to bring new DashMart sites to life.
You'll design, implement, and continuously improve regulatory processes and playbooks that enable faster, more predictable outcomes across markets.
You're unafraid of ambiguity. Rapid change and learning is exciting to you, and you thrive in ambiguous, startup environments
You have completed your BS/BA Degree. Preferably in a relevant field such as Urban Planning, Public Policy, Environmental Policy, Real Estate Development, or a related discipline.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Familiarity with zoning, permitting, or entitlements is preferred.
Preferably in a relevant field such as Urban Planning, Public Policy, Environmental Policy, Real Estate Development, or a related discipline.
